recommendations.action: Cut the crawl graph down to pages with real distribution.
recommendations.rationale: 1,242 sitemap URLs currently have zero internal links. Indexable pages with no path from the site are weak candidates for sustained ranking and send thin-site signals.

recommendations.action: Collapse or noindex most localized property-tax estimator pages.
recommendations.rationale: 146 property-tax tool URLs generated 16,392 impressions at 0.17% CTR, with 100 low-CTR pages. Keep state/county hubs indexable, and move city pages to noindex until they earn links or unique copy.

recommendations.action: Rewrite titles, intros, and H1s for the existing striking-distance blog winners before publishing more posts.
recommendations.rationale: 100 blog URLs already have 100+ impressions with zero clicks. The problem is mostly snippet fit and intent matching, not topic discovery.

recommendations.action: Merge overlapping pages around the same query and redirect the weaker variant.
recommendations.rationale: 22 cannibalization clusters are active in the current query export. The strongest conflicts are around DSCR requirements, property-tax county vs city tools, broker-vs-bank, and cash-out seasoning.

recommendations.action: Refresh date-sensitive copy on pages still referencing 2025.
recommendations.rationale: 191 page files still contain 2025 references. For pages targeting 2026 queries, stale dates can suppress trust and CTR even when rankings are decent.
